inputs.vague: The Spirit Director selects a SuperFrog Student account to deactivate, provides a reason, and confirms the action. The system then deactivates the account and informs the Spirit Director.
inputs.detailed:
Primary Actor:
Spirit Director
Secondary Actors:


Trigger:
The Spirit Director indicates to deactivate the account of a SuperFrog Student.
Description:
When a SuperFrog Student retires, the Spirit Director wants to deactivate the account of this SuperFrog Student, so that this student no longer has access to the System.
Preconditions:
PRE-1. The Spirit Director is logged into the System.
PRE-2. The User has the “admin” privilege.
Postconditions:
POST-1. The account of a SuperFrog Student is deactivated.
Main Success Scenario:
The Spirit Director indicates to deactivate the account of a SuperFrog Student.
The Spirit Director views the details of this SuperFrog Student through UC-16: View a SuperFrog Student account and chooses to deactivate this account.
The System asks the Spirit Director to enter a reason and confirm.
The Spirit Director enters the reason and confirms the deactivation.
The System validates this deactivation.
The System deactivates this account and informs the Spirit Director that this account has been deactivated.
The System notifies relevant actors about the deactivation of an account according to the “Notification” defined in the Associated Information of this use case.
Use case ends.
Extensions:
5a. This SuperFrog Student still has incomplete assigned appearances:
5a1. The System alerts the Spirit Director that this SuperFrog Student has an active assigned appearance. Deactivation cannot be done at this moment.
5a2. Use case terminates.
5b. This SuperFrog Student has completed appearance requests, which have not been submitted to the TCU Payroll Services:
5b1. The System alerts the Spirit Director that she needs to generate TCU Honorarium (Payment for services) Requests for this SuperFrog Student before deactivating her account.
5b2. Use case terminates.

groundTruth.name: Deactivate SuperFrog Student Account
groundTruth.summary: The Spirit Director deactivates a SuperFrog Student's account when the student retires, removing system access.
preconditions: The Spirit Director is logged into the System.

steps.description: Indicates to deactivate the account of a SuperFrog Student.
Views the details of the SuperFrog Student through UC-16: View a SuperFrog Student account and chooses to deactivate this account.
Asks the Spirit Director to enter a reason and confirm.
Enters the reason and confirms the deactivation.
Deactivates this account and informs the Spirit Director that this account has been deactivated.
Notifies relevant actors about the deactivation of an account.

flows.condition: This SuperFrog Student still has incomplete assigned appearances

steps.description: Alerts the Spirit Director that this SuperFrog Student has an active assigned appearance. Deactivation cannot be done at this moment.

flows.condition: This SuperFrog Student has completed appearance requests, which have not been submitted to the TCU Payroll Services

steps.description: Alerts the Spirit Director that she needs to generate TCU Honorarium (Payment for services) Requests for this SuperFrog Student before deactivating her account.
